name: Fresh Herb & Chive Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F and oil cookie sheets.
2. Blend tofu until smooth. Add apple juice and lemon juice.
3. Mix well and transfer to a medium-sized mixing bowl. Set aside.
4. Sift together the remaining ingredients (baking powder, baking soda, salt, basil, dried basil, chives, and dried chives).
5. Fold the sifted ingredients into the tofu mixture. Stir in the chopped herbs.
6. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured board and form into a ball.
7. Roll dough to 1/2-inch thickness and cut with a cookie cutter.
8. Bake for 12 minutes and serve immediately.
